title: FlexCard Definition Schema
description: Documents the JSON structure of a Vlocity/OmniStudio FlexCard DataPack definition file. FlexCards are low-code UI components that display data in context-driven layouts with conditional states, actions, and child card composition.

topLevel.description: Top-level fields in the FlexCard DataPack JSON.

Name.description: Developer name / API name of the FlexCard. Used as the LWC component name when activated.

Author.description: The author or team that created this FlexCard.

isFlex.description: When true, this is a FlexCard (as opposed to an older Card type). Should always be true for modern OmniStudio FlexCards.

isRepeatable.description: When true, this FlexCard iterates over a list of records from its data source and renders one card per record.

enableLwc.description: Enables LWC compilation/activation for this card. When true, a compiled LWC is generated and deployed.

osSupport.description: When true, this FlexCard supports embedding within OmniScripts.

globalCSS.description: Custom CSS string applied globally to this FlexCard's rendered component. Used for card-level style overrides.

version.description: Version number of the FlexCard definition. Incremented on each save.

GlobalKey.description: Unique GUID used by the DataPack framework to track this FlexCard across orgs and deployments.

dataSource.description: Defines where the FlexCard fetches its data from. The dataSource block configures the data query executed when the card is loaded.

type.description: The data source type. 'DataRaptor' uses a DataRaptor Extract bundle. 'IntegrationProcedure' calls an IP. 'Custom' uses a custom Apex class. 'SOQL' runs a direct SOQL query.

value.description: The identifier of the data source. For DataRaptor: bundle API name. For IntegrationProcedure: Type_SubType key. For SOQL: the SOQL query string.

contextVariables.description: Array of context variable mappings passed to the data source. Each item maps a card context variable (e.g., recordId) to an input key for the data source.

name.description: Input key name for the data source.

value.description: Context variable or value to pass. Common values: '{recordId}', '{userId}', '{objectApiName}'.

orderBy.description: Field name to sort data source results by (for list/repeatable cards).

limit.description: Maximum number of records to fetch from the data source.

states.description: Array of state definitions. A FlexCard can have multiple states that render different layouts/content based on data conditions. The first matching state is rendered.

name.description: Unique state identifier. The default/initial state is usually named 'baseState' or 'default'.

label.description: Human-readable label for this state, shown in the designer.

filter.description: Condition formula or filter expression that determines when this state is active. Evaluated against the card's data. If empty, state is always active.

sobjectLabel.description: Label of the SObject associated with this state (for record-detail cards).

actions.description: Array of action definitions available in this state (displayed as buttons or menu items). See 'actions' schema for detail.

childCards.description: Array of embedded child FlexCard references to render within this state.

name.description: Developer name of the child FlexCard component.

title.description: Display title for this child card section.

components.description: The component tree for this state. Structured as nested layer objects. Top level is always 'layer-0' which contains child blocks and elements.

layer-0.description: Root layout layer. Contains a 'children' array of block/element definitions.

children.description: Array of component blocks and elements. Can be nested arbitrarily deep through 'block' components.

block.description: A layout container (row/column wrapper) that groups child elements. Used for structural layout control.

class.description: CSS class names applied to the block container.

children.description: Nested child components within this block.

outputField.description: Displays a field value from the data source in a label/value format. The most common display element.

label.description: Label displayed above or beside the value.

value.description: Data binding expression referencing a field from the data source. E.g., '{record.Name}' or '{Name}'.

valueType.description: Controls how the value is formatted/rendered.

button.description: An action trigger element rendered as a button. Clicking executes one or more actions from the state's actionList.

action.description: Name of the action or actionList to execute when clicked.

variant.description: SLDS button variant for visual styling.

disabled.description: Formula or boolean to disable the button.

image.description: Displays an image within the card. URL can be static or dynamically bound to data.

src.description: URL of the image to display. Supports data binding: '{imageUrl}'.

text.description: Displays static or data-bound text. Supports HTML and Merge Field syntax.

value.description: Text content. Supports {fieldName} data bindings and HTML markup.

icon.description: Renders an SLDS icon within the card.

datatable.description: Displays a tabular list of records using SLDS datatable. Used in repeatable cards or to show related lists.

columns.description: Column definitions. Each item has 'label', 'fieldName', 'type', and optional 'sortable' properties.

data.description: Data binding path to the array of records to display (e.g., '{records}').

keyField.description: Unique field used as row key.

enableInfiniteLoading.description: Enables infinite scroll for large datasets.

childCard.description: Embeds another FlexCard as a child component within this card's layout.

name.description: Developer name of the child FlexCard.

title.description: Section title for this embedded card.

events.description: Array of event listener/publisher definitions on this FlexCard. Enables pub/sub communication between FlexCards and OmniScripts.

eventname.description: The event name to listen for or publish. Used to coordinate cross-component communication.

eventtype.description: 'pubsub' uses the OmniStudio pub/sub bus for cross-component messaging. 'event' is a standard LWC custom event.

channelname.description: Pub/sub channel name for routing events to the correct subscribers.

actionList.description: Actions to execute when this event fires. Same structure as state actions.
Defines the list of actions executed by buttons, events, or state triggers. Each action in the list runs sequentially.

updateOmniScript.description: Updates data in a sibling or parent OmniScript's JSON data node.

navigate.description: Navigates the user to a URL or Salesforce page.

invokeMethod.description: Invokes a named method on the FlexCard or a child component.

methodName.description: Name of the method to invoke.

params.description: Parameters to pass to the method.

runIP.description: Executes an Integration Procedure and optionally refreshes the card data.

integrationProcedureKey.description: Type_SubType of the IP to run.

extraPayload.description: Additional data passed to the IP.

refreshCard.description: When true, refreshes the card data after IP execution.

openCard.description: Opens another FlexCard in a modal or a new context.

cardName.description: Developer name of the FlexCard to open.

params.description: Context parameters passed to the opened card.

deleteRecord.description: Deletes a Salesforce record using the record's Id.

recordId.description: Id of the record to delete. E.g., '{Id}'.

pubsub.description: Publishes an event on the OmniStudio pub/sub bus.
